details: Added `redact_module_roots` helper to `crates/tokmd-format/src/lib.rs` to process roots under `RedactMode::All`.
Modified `write_export_json` and `write_export_jsonl` to use `redact_module_roots` and bind values to `data` and `args` output wrappers.
Successfully ran `cargo fmt`, `cargo clippy`, and `cargo test` for `tokmd-format`.
